events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **pass**, low risk. The field method is only cosmetically less tidy than the shop preference, but it conforms to the OEM/product listed instructions and the project requirement, and nothing on record (drawing note, local amendment) forbids it — so it's compliant, not a defect. Flagged a follow-up to verify final torque documentation at completion rather than treating the deviation as a finding.
